name: shaping-skills
description: Shaping, breadboarding, and transcript-to-document skills for Codex and Claude.

interface.shortDescription: Shape problems, breadboard systems, and distill transcripts into build docs.
interface.longDescription: A dual-target skill pack for collaborative shaping before implementation: framing docs, kickoff docs, shaping, breadboarding, and breadboard reflection.
defaultPrompt: Help me shape this feature before we build it.
Breadboard this workflow into places, affordances, and wiring.
Turn these transcripts into a framing or kickoff document.
